chapter_title: Issuance of Licenses, Expiration, and Renewal
article_title: Persons Required to Be Licensed, Exemptions, and Age Limits
text: No person shall have in his or her possession or otherwise under his or her control more than one driver’s license.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 6. DRIVERS' LICENSES [12500 - 15326]
### Chapter 1. Issuance of Licenses, Expiration, and Renewal [12500 - 13020]
#### Article 1. Persons Required to Be Licensed, Exemptions, and Age Limits [12500 - 12527]
##### § 12511

No person shall have in his or her possession or otherwise under his or her control more than one driver’s license.

*(Amended by Stats. 1988, Ch. 1509, Sec. 4.)*

subsections.text: No person shall have in his or her possession or otherwise under his or her control more than one driver’s license.
